text: Two studies on response diligence and trip reporting were published in Travel Behaviour and Society and Transportation Research Part A; a related study is in press in Transportation Research Procedia.
Presented research on item nonresponse and trip underreporting at the 72nd Infrastructure Planning Conference in Fukui, Japan.
Presented research on item nonresponse and trip underreporting at Kobe University.
Published a study of mobility disparities in time-varying multimodal networks in Physica A.
Began Ph.D. study in Engineering and joined the JST SPRING Program at Kumamoto University.
